beforeAfter.title: The Problem & Solution
beforeAfter.beforeFiles: 6 config files. Always out of sync.
beforeAfter.afterFiles: Single source. Auto-synced to all tools.

features.title: What You Get
features.universalRulesDesc: One source of truth automatically applied to all 6 AI coding tools.
features.agentsDesc: Specialist agents for architecture, security, testing, performance, and accessibility.
features.workflowDesc: PLAN → ACT → EVAL cycle ensures consistent quality across all development.
features.qualityDesc: TDD, SOLID principles, and 90%+ test coverage enforced as standard practice.
features.mcpDesc: Standard Model Context Protocol for seamless AI tool integration.
features.zeroConfigDesc: One command to install. Works out of the box with all supported tools.
